svg.title: Chapter 17 MoA whip curvature figure
svg.desc: Supplemental artifact-generated MoA architecture figure that bends the sparse StructuredMoA paths into a wraparound whip envelope around the routed blocks.
svg.text: Supplemental curvature view of the sparse 2-of-4 MoA architecture

text.tspan: The sparse path family now reads as a curved enclosure:
outer routing wraps around the blocks, and each block folds through an inner whip;
the outer whip snaps the live paths back to one output.
